column1: # keyMatch2 is used for URL matching: /path/:param style patterns
# "*" in the method column matches any HTTP method (via matcher)
# Role names MUST match user_privileges values stored in the database:
# Common routes accessible by ALL authenticated roles
# ADMIN (CSI Admin) - full CSI access + user management + template params + scheduler
# Template parameter (ADMIN only among CSI roles)
# OPERATOR (CSI Operator) - CSI operations without user mgmt/templates/scheduler
# TMS ADMIN - full TMS access + user management + activation + scheduler
# TMS SUPERVISOR - TMS operations + activation/credential (no user mgmt/scheduler)
# TMS OPERATOR - basic TMS operations only
